back_translation: The LORD reigns! He is robed in majesty; the LORD has clothed Himself with strength like a weapon. The world is indeed firmly established; it cannot be moved.
Your throne was established long ago; You are from all eternity.
The floodwaters have risen, O LORD; the rivers have lifted up their voice; the seas lift up their pounding waves.
Above the roar of many waters, above the mighty breakers of the sea, the LORD on high is majestic.
Your testimonies are fully confirmed; holiness adorns Your house, O LORD, for all the days to come.
